name: Cultured Meat Production Cost
description: Cost per kilogram to produce cell-cultured meat. Tracks the dramatic cost decline from early proof-of-concept through pilot production. Data is sparse and often self-reported by companies.

data_points.source: Mark Post / Maastricht University — first cultured beef burger cost ~$330,000 for 140g patty = ~$2.36M/kg, commonly cited as $1.2M/kg for the project
Mosa Meat — Mark Post's estimates for second-generation production costs
Memphis Meats (now Upside Foods) — reported $2,400/pound ($5,300/kg) for chicken; adjusted for improvements
Future Meat Technologies — claimed $360/kg production cost at lab scale
Future Meat Technologies — claimed $7.70/lb ($17/kg) for chicken breast; independent estimates higher at ~$50/kg
GFI State of the Industry Report 2023 — estimated production costs for leading companies; Upside Foods and Good Meat FDA/USDA approved
GFI / industry estimates — projected costs with larger bioreactor scale; still far from retail parity (approx)
